payload.description: Stand up PostgreSQL + asyncpg for the Relational Query Engine. Install asyncpg, create the 'agenticbusinessempire' database and role, run db.migrate() to apply DDL, and update TECH_STACK.md to mark relational_qe status as 'operational'. Also update bxthre3_ledger.json readiness scores post-completion.
deliverables: AgenticBusinessEmpire/kernel/db.py (mode switches from STUB to operational)
commands: sudo -u postgres createdb -O agenticbusinessempire agenticbusinessempire || true
python3 -c "import asyncio; from AgenticBusinessEmpire.kernel import db; asyncio.run(db.init_pool()); asyncio.run(db.migrate())"
